item.title: Flupnolide: Chris @Flupnolide · 4min Come join the team as we dominate trading in Sports. Cita Working @ Novig @NovigCareers · 25min
item.description: Chris @Flupnolide · 4min Come join the team as we dominate trading in Sports. Cita Working @ Novig @NovigCareers · 25min Know how pro and college sports markets move and want to use that judgment in a live trading environment with real impact? This role could be for you 5 282

item.title: peteroverzet: Matthew Berry reposteó peter overzet @peteroverzet · 7min not sure there is a more freedman ass thing than updating his
RapSheet: Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 8min #Bama OT Kadyn Proctor, one of the Draft's top tackles, most recently visited the #49ers o
item.description: Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 8min #Bama OT Kadyn Proctor, one of the Draft's top tackles, most recently visited the #49ers on a Top 30 visit. Proctor has spent time with the #Chiefs, #Browns, #Lions, #Dolphins, #Eagles and #AZCardinals, among others. 21 50 173 39 mil
